title: craftable totem of undying
description: This is data-pack witch adds craft to Totem of undying
body:
**Custom Totem of Undying Recipe

This data pack introduces a new crafting recipe for the **Totem of Undying** in Minecraft. With this custom recipe, you can now craft the Totem of Undying using a combination of emeralds, gold ingots, and a gold block. Perfect for those who want a new challenge or to customize their gameplay experience!

  undefined

**Ingredients:**

*   **2 emeralds**
*   **4 Gold ingots**
*   **1 Gold block**

**Result: Totem of Undying**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c35723b3-ddd3-4309-8cdd-5dec11ec8505.png)**

**Crafting Instructions:**

1.  Place one Emerald in the top-left and bottom-right corners of the crafting grid.
2.  Fill the middle row with Gold Ingots and a Gold Block in the center.
3.  Complete the pattern by placing Gold Ingots in the remaining spaces of the grid.

 

**Installation Instructions:**

1.  Download the data pack and place it into the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world.
2.  Run the `/datapack enable` command in your Minecraft world to activate the data pack.
3.  Start crafting and enjoy your new recipe!

**Compatibility:**

*   Works with Minecraft version \[from1.20 to 1.13 \].

.**
